{"credits": [], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-367", "name": "Time-of-check Time-of-use (TOCTOU) Race Condition"}], "description": "### Duplicate Advisory
This advisory has been withdrawn because it is a duplicate of GHSA-gwm6-q8ch-hcfr. This link is maintained to preserve external references.

### Original Description
A Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) vulnerability exists in the install utility of uutils coreutils when using the -D flag. The command creates parent directories and subsequently performs a second path resolution to create the target file, neither of which is anchored to a directory file descriptor. An attacker with concurrent write access can replace a path component with a symbolic link between these operations, redirecting the privileged write to an arbitrary file system location.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m26v-hjq3-x245", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-30T17:12:52Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m26v-hjq3-x245", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m26v-hjq3-x245"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-22T17:16:38Z", "published_at": "2026-04-22T18:31:45Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-35356", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/pull/10140", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/releases/tag/0.7.0", "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils/commit/0c41299975f3c1e21cf5ca968d42cad55ceb42a1", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m26v-hjq3-x245"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/uutils/coreutils", "summary": "Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-06T19:54:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m26v-hjq3-x245", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.7.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "coreutils"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 0.7.0"}], "withdrawn_at": "2026-07-06T19:54:51Z"}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Duplicate Advisory: uutils coreutils has a Time-of-Check to Time-of-Use (TOCTOU) race condition
